title: Defense & Aerospace Product
description: Product entry for the Defense & Aerospace Product Explorer. Maps to WP custom post type 'finderproducts' with ACF fields.

fields.label: Model Number
fields.description: Short model identifier displayed as the primary label in product cards

fields.label: Product Name
fields.description: Descriptive name (without model prefix), shown as subtitle in product cards
examples: High Speed (100G) Avionics Network Test Instrument

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Short product summary shown in the explorer results

fields.label: Product Image
fields.description: Product photo or rendering displayed in the explorer card
fields.wpField: image (direct URL) or featured_media (WP media ID)

fields.label: Product Category
fields.description: The primary product category this product belongs to

fields.label: Search Weight
fields.description: Sort priority within category results. Lower number = higher priority (1-37 range in source data).

fields.label: Brochure Button Label
fields.description: CTA button text for the brochure/datasheet link

fields.label: Brochure URL
fields.description: Link to product brochure PDF, HubSpot form, or external product page

fields.label: Brochure Link Target
fields.description: Whether brochure opens in new tab

fields._description: These fields drive the product explorer's faceted filtering. Each maps to a WP ACF filter field.

fields.label: Platform
fields.description: Hardware platform form factors this product supports

fields.label: Physical Interface
fields.description: Connection types: copper or optical

fields.label: Software-Defined
fields.description: Whether the instrument is software-defined/reconfigurable

fields.label: CE Certified
fields.description: CE compliance/certification flag

fields.label: Supported Bus Protocols
fields.description: Bus protocols this product supports (used for filtering)

fields.label: Test Applications
fields.description: Test application scenarios this product supports (used for filtering)
options: Concurrent parallel and serial bus test

fields.label: Number of Channels
fields.description: Channel count (for Analog, Optical, Switching, Parallel Digital categories)

fields.label: Instrument Function
fields.description: Instrument function type (Analog Test category only)

fields.label: Resolution
fields.description: ADC/DAC resolution (Analog Test category only)

fields.label: Analog Bandwidth
fields.description: Analog bandwidth (Analog Test category only)

fields.label: Maximum Sample Rate
fields.description: Maximum sample rate (Analog Test category only)

fields._description: These reference popup detail fragments for the supported bus and test application detail overlays.

fields.label: Supported Bus Details
fields.description: Rich popup details for each supported bus entry (heading, description, related instruments, CTA, image)

fields.label: Test Application Details
fields.description: Rich popup details for each test application entry
